342.name: 廣告禮品
342.description: Corporate promotional gifts are an effective tool for brand awareness and client relationship building. We offer a wide range of practical merchandise including keychains, stationery, electronics accessories, drinkware and gift sets, all with logo printing.

348.name: 襟章
348.description: Custom pin badges are a classic choice for corporate identity and event souvenirs. We offer hard enamel, soft enamel and printed badge options with precise logo reproduction. Ideal for uniform accessories, commemorative gifts and promotional events.
